Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''/Users/thomasjones/hc-cdaio-kg/relationships/integrates_with.json''\)\); print\(''relationships count:'', len\(d.get\(''relationships'', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''/Users/thomasjones/hc-cdaio-kg/graph.json''\)\); rels=d.get\(''relationships'',[]\); iw=[r for r in rels if r.get\(''relationship_type''\)==''integrates_with'']; print\(f''Total rels: {len\(rels\)}, integrates_with: {len\(iw\)}''\)")
